name: ai-video-factory
description: Mass-produce retention-optimized Korean videos with MiniMax (image/video/TTS) + Remotion. Full pipeline (topic → script → storyboard → generate → assemble/render) across 4 visual templates: montage (AI-image fast-cut), slides (Claude-style keynote), theory (3Blue1Brown-style graphs), and gitgraph (git internals visualization).
